figures.caption: FIG. 1. Typical linear systems: (a) PINN-generated potential landscape near a stable focus; (b) learned and theoretical potentials along the x axis for the stable focus; (c) PINNgenerated potential landscape near an unstable focus; (d) learned and theoretical potentials along the x axis for the unstable focus.

FIG. 2. Hopf normal form: (a) Flow (arrows) and limit cycle (a unit circle); (b) potential landscape; (c) radial profiles of the PINN-derived potential (dash line) and the exact potential (solid line); (d) pattern of directional derivative of potential with respect to the field.
FIG. 3. Van der Pol oscillator: (a) Flow (arrows) and limit cycle (solid curve); (b) potential landscape.
FIG. 4. 3D Hopf links: (a) Flow near two linked limit cycles; (b) potential landscape in the xy slice; (c) potential landscape in the zy slice.
